summary: Created comprehensive Skills/frontend/SKILL.md with Agent Skills frontmatter, input spectrum handling, generation workflow, platform-specific output sections for Zo.space/HTML/Next.js, anti-slop guardrails, and template application system
learnings: Skill structure follows Agent Skills spec with proper frontmatter validation
Platform-specific sections provide clear technical requirements for each target
Anti-slop section references references/anti-patterns.md even though file doesn't exist yet - Wave 2 will create it
Template application section is ready for template YAML files from Wave 2
Comprehensive design principles and quality standards provide clear generation guidance
notes: Complete SKILL.md created with all required sections. References to references/anti-patterns.md and templates/*.yaml are forward-looking for Wave 2 tasks. Skill is immediately usable for generating landing pages across all three target platforms.
